description: Dropdown context menu triggered by a custom element. Contains TmContextMenuItem children and closes on Escape key press.

parameters.name: Trigger
parameters.description: The trigger element that opens the menu.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Context menu with actions
examples.code:
<TmContextMenu>
    <Trigger>
        <TmButton Variant="ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="ButtonSize.Sm">...</TmButton>
    </Trigger>
    <ChildContent>
        <TmContextMenuItem Label="Edit" Icon="edit" OnClick="EditItem" />
        <TmContextMenuItem Label="Duplicate" Icon="copy" OnClick="DuplicateItem" />
        <TmContextMenuItem IsDivider="true" />
        <TmContextMenuItem Label="Delete" Icon="trash-2" IsDangerous="true" OnClick="DeleteItem" />
    </ChildContent>
</TmContextMenu>
